name: sugar-pep-bootstrap-v0
requiredChecks: from catalog CID recomputes from from-catalog-v1.6.2.json
to catalog CID recomputes from to-catalog-v1.6.3.json
catalog diff contains exactly one modified property
no ProofIR grammar, canonicalization, proof-file, or all-layer lift output semantics changed
v1.6.3 catalog attestation signature verifies under acceptedSigner
nonGoals: execute extension bytecode in core verification
require every language kit lifter to implement package inspection
